events.title: Sea Serpent
events.desc: A serpentine neck rises from the depths, water sheeting off dark scales.

events.title: Kraken's Reach
events.desc: A single tentacle breaks the surface nearby — forty feet long and searching.

events.title: Hostile Merfolk
events.desc: Scaled figures surface armed with bone tridents. They do not look welcoming.

events.title: Floating Wreckage
events.desc: Debris bobs on the surface — a sealed chest among it, stamped with a royal cipher.

events.title: Sunken Ruins
events.desc: The water is clear. Far below, the outline of towers and streets is unmistakable.

events.title: The Maelstrom
events.desc: A spiral of water opens on the horizon. It is enormous. It is moving toward you.

events.title: Time Fog
events.desc: A bank of silver mist rolls in. When it clears, the stars are in the wrong positions.

events.title: Pirate Raiders
events.desc: A longboat beaches nearby. Armed sailors fan out, scanning for valuables.

events.title: Giant Crab
events.desc: The rocks shift — they aren't rocks. A crab the size of a barn heaves upright.

events.title: Sea Hag
events.desc: A figure beckons from the tideline, beautiful from a distance, terrifying up close.

events.title: Shipwreck
events.desc: A wrecked hull lies in the shallows. The cargo hold is accessible at low tide.

events.title: Sea Cave Cache
events.desc: A cave behind a waterfall holds crates stamped with a long-defunct trading company.

events.title: Ghost Ship
events.desc: A galleon glides silently through the fog — no crew, no wind, no explanation.

events.title: Siren Song
events.desc: Music drifts from the sea. The most beautiful sound any of you has ever heard. It's getting louder.

events.title: Wolf Pack
events.desc: A pack of gaunt wolves emerges from the tall grass, yellow eyes locked on the party.

events.title: Wandering Ogre
events.desc: A lumbering ogre blocks the road, demanding a toll of "shiny things."

events.title: Giant Boar
events.desc: The ground trembles as a massive boar thunders out of the grass, tusks gleaming.

events.title: Merchant's Wagon
events.desc: A painted wagon sits unattended. Its owner is gone, but the goods remain.

events.title: Hidden Cache
events.desc: A loose stone marks a pit. Inside: wrapped provisions and a handful of old coins.

events.title: Fairy Ring
events.desc: A perfect circle of glowing mushrooms hums with music. Time feels elastic inside.

events.title: Standing Stones
events.desc: Three ancient menhirs pulse with forgotten power. Their runes shift as you watch.

events.title: Dire Wolf
events.desc: A wolf the size of a horse steps between the trees, breath misting in the cool air.

events.title: Giant Spider
events.desc: Silken webs span the path. Something large stirs in the canopy above.

events.title: Forest Troll
events.desc: A moss-covered troll lurches from behind a fallen oak, sniffing the air.

events.title: Druid's Cache
events.desc: A hollow tree conceals a bundle of salves, seeds, and a carved wooden token.

events.title: Ranger's Camp
events.desc: An abandoned campsite, still warm. Whoever was here left in a hurry.

events.title: Whispering Grove
events.desc: The trees speak in overlapping voices, arguing about something long forgotten.

events.title: Will-o'-Wisp
events.desc: A blue light dances between trunks, always just out of reach, leading deeper in.

events.title: Bandit Ambush
events.desc: Arrows thud into the earth. Rough voices demand surrender from the ridgeline.

events.title: Hill Giant
events.desc: A giant hurls boulders at birds from the nearest hill — and then notices the party.

events.title: Goblin Warband
events.desc: A dozen goblins pour over the crest, shrieking and waving rusty blades.

events.title: Buried Treasure
events.desc: A rusted sword pommel sticks from the earth. Pulling it reveals a buried iron box.

events.title: Ruined Watchtower
events.desc: A crumbling tower commands the hill. A skeleton clutches a sealed message tube.

events.title: Echo Stones
events.desc: Certain rocks repeat your words back in different voices, seconds after you move on.

events.title: Gravity Anomaly
events.desc: Pebbles drift upward in a small clearing. Loose coins float from pockets.

events.title: Griffon
events.desc: A griffon descends from above with a piercing shriek, wings beating a storm of dust.

events.title: Wyvern
events.desc: A wyvern circles overhead, its barbed tail trailing poison. It has spotted the party.

events.title: Mountain Lions
events.desc: Three tawny lions flank the party from opposite ridges, moving in perfect silence.

events.title: Fallen Knight
events.desc: A knight in tarnished armor lies by the path. The sword and shield are still intact.

events.title: Hermit's Cave
events.desc: A recluse offers cryptic warnings and trades a strange flask for bread.

events.title: Ley Line Crossing
events.desc: The air crackles. Spells misfire. The ground hums with invisible power beneath.

events.title: Ghost of the Pass
events.desc: A transparent warrior marches the ridge. It does not notice the living.

events.title: Dragon Wyrmling
events.desc: A young dragon emerges from a cave mouth, breathing jets of flame.

events.title: Stone Golem
events.desc: What seemed a rockface lurches forward — a massive golem, eyes glowing dull red.

events.title: Frost Giant
events.desc: A frost giant crests the ridge, glacier-blue eyes scanning below.

events.title: Dwarf Vault
events.desc: A carved door is set into the mountainside, half-buried in scree. The lock is old.

events.title: Frozen Explorer
events.desc: A figure suspended in ice clutches a satchel. The bag is frozen but clearly full.

events.title: Voice in the Peak
events.desc: A voice booms from the summit in no known tongue. The mountain is asking something.

events.title: Crystal Visions
events.desc: Quartz formations reflect scenes that haven't happened yet — or have, elsewhere.

events.title: Giant Scorpion
events.desc: A scorpion the size of a cart crawls from beneath the sand, claws raised.

events.title: Sand Worm
events.desc: The ground vibrates. Seconds before something enormous breaks the surface.

events.title: Desert Lich
events.desc: A desiccated figure stands at the dune's crest. It speaks. The air grows cold.

events.title: Sunken Temple
events.desc: Wind has exposed the carved top of a buried structure. Stairs lead into darkness.

events.title: Merchant's Bones
events.desc: A collapsed merchant lies half-buried. The cargo is sealed and intact.

events.title: Mirage City
events.desc: A gleaming city shimmers at the horizon and shows no sign of fading as you approach.

events.title: Solar Deity Vision
events.desc: A figure of living flame walks beside the party for seven steps at high noon, then vanishes.

events.title: Bog Troll
events.desc: Something enormous slides from the black water, reaching with long arms.

events.title: Swamp Witch
events.desc: A figure watches from a stilted shack. She already knows your names.

events.title: Poison Serpents
events.desc: The water comes alive with serpents, converging as if drawn by something stranger than hunger.

events.title: Sunken Chest
events.desc: A glint in the murk catches the eye. Heavy with silt, but the lock has snapped.

events.title: Poacher's Cache
events.desc: A waterproof bundle hangs from a submerged tree — traps, vials, and a hand-drawn map.

events.title: The Green Mist
events.desc: A luminous mist settles around your knees. Shapes move inside it. Too many limbs.

events.title: Forgotten Shrine
events.desc: A carved face rises from the mire, weeping black water. Offerings were left recently.
